zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Napier於1440年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓時，她的父親Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh26歲，母親Elizabeth Lauder46歲。她於1472年與Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1512年在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Napier于1440年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓时，她的父亲Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh26岁，母亲Elizabeth Lauder46岁。她于1472年与Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1512年在苏格兰艾丁波享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Napier was born in 1440, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Lauder, was 46. She married Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome in 1472, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1512, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Napier est née en 1440, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lauder, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome en 1472, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1512, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Napier 1440 in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lauder 46. Sie hat 1472 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1512 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Napier è nata il nel 1440 nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lauder, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome nel 1472, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1512, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Napierが1440年にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで生まれた時，父Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburghは26歳，母Elizabeth Lauderは46歳であった。1472年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでSir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsomeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1512年にスコットランドエディンブルグで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Napier(이)가 1440년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lauder(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1472년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Napier nasceu em 1440, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lauder, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome em 1472, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1512, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Napier родилась в 1440 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lauder, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome в 1472 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1512 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Napier nació en 1440, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lauder, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome en 1472, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1512, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años.
